chaotic_hexahedron.title: Find a Chaotic Hexahedron (Dungeon Now Loading — drops from Dungeon bosses, reward rooms)

spawner_blade.title: Collect a Spawner Blade (Dungeon Now Loading — drops in late-tier dungeon loot chests)

subtitle.text: Some civilizations encrypted their knowledge. The Cryptic civilization encrypted themselves.

description: The Cryptic Eye is not a memory or a wound.
The Cryptic civilization understood that knowledge could be destroyed
and so they encoded everything in structures — dungeons, vaults, mazes.
Their cities are still here. Their people are not.
What survives them is the architecture of their secrecy.
Dungeon Now Loading generates these structures.
The Chaotic Hexahedron is found in boss reward rooms and late-tier chests.
The Spawner Blade is another Cryptic drop — a weapon that generates enemies from itself.
You will know you are in a Cryptic dungeon by the hexagonal geometry.
→ Find a Chaotic Hexahedron from dungeon bosses [check]
→ Collect a Spawner Blade from dungeon loot [check]
